name: Pradhan Mantri Mudra Yojana – Tarun
administered_by: Department of Financial Services, Ministry of Finance (MUDRA Ltd. / NCGTC)
retrieval_text: Growth-stage collateral-free loan above Rs 5 lakh up to Rs 10 lakh under the Pradhan Mantri Mudra Yojana (PMMY), for established micro and small non-farm enterprises in manufacturing, trading, and services seeking to scale up. Loans up to Rs 10 lakh fall within the no-collateral ceiling and are covered under the Credit Guarantee Fund for Micro Units (CGFMU). Available through scheduled commercial banks, regional rural banks, small finance banks, MFIs, and NBFCs.
documents_required: Utility Bill (not older than 3 months) as Residence Proof
Business Address Proof (e.g., Rent Agreement or Business Utility Bill)
Bank Statements (last 12 months) of Business Account
Income Tax Returns (last 2-3 years) of Business and Proprietor/Partners/Directors
Quotations for Machinery/Equipment/Items to be purchased
